{{Infobox character
| name = Governor Seiren
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Governor Seiren]] questions [[Raion]]'s desire to convince others.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Governor Seiren]] is the Governor.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Governor Seiren]]'s family is the reason [[Visiria]] has a governor instead of a sovereign planetary government.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Governor Seiren]] is the [[Planetary Governor]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Oh my, does that mean you have no one else you wish to convince?” Governor Seiren asked.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
